'''Mondder''' was the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Etti IV/Legends|Etti IV]]. It contained the [[Mondder Spaceport]] and the [[Imperial Embassy (Etti IV)|Imperial Embassy]].

{{City-stub}}
